image:image.image:title: Cinegma Films — Independent Pakistani Cinema by Syed Asad Raza Abidi
image:image.image:caption: Official website of Cinegma Films. 14 international awards. 22 global selections. 9 countries.

image:image.image:title: Watch Films — Cinegma Films | Janjaal, Portrait of Life & More
image:image.image:caption: Stream films by Cinegma Films including award-winning Pakistani short films directed by Syed Asad Raza Abidi.

video:video.video:title: Janjaal (Tussle) — Full Film Stream
video:video.video:description: A police officer discovers a cursed golden pocket watch. Each wish exacts a deadly price. 14 international awards across 9 countries. Directed by Syed Asad Raza Abidi.

image:image.image:title: Syed Asad Raza Abidi — Pakistani Filmmaker, Director
image:image.image:caption: Syed Asad Raza Abidi, founder of Cinegma Films. Director, editor, and colorist based in Karachi, Pakistan.

image:image.image:title: Press & EPK — Cinegma Films | Syed Asad Raza Abidi
image:image.image:caption: Press kit, biography, awards and downloadable media for Cinegma Films and filmmaker Syed Asad Raza Abidi.

image:image.image:title: Janjaal (Tussle) — Award-Winning Pakistani Short Film
image:image.image:caption: Janjaal (Tussle) — a 23-minute psychological thriller by Syed Asad Raza Abidi. 14 international awards across 9 countries.

image:image.image:title: Portrait of Life — Drama Short Film by Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Portrait of Life — a drama by Syed Asad Raza Abidi. A painter struggles to portray his wife the way he once did.

image:image.image:title: Zawaal — Psychological Thriller by Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Zawaal — a dark psychological thriller set in the streets of Karachi. In production.

image:image.image:title: A Soldier Beside Me — War Drama by Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: A Soldier Beside Me — two soldiers question each other's fate on the frontline. In production.

image:image.image:title: Payam-e-Dil — Family Drama by Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Payam-e-Dil — a family drama unfolding in the posh heart of Karachi. In production.

image:image.image:title: Main Aur Achu — Family Drama Short Film
image:image.image:caption: Main Aur Achu — a heartwarming story about a boy and his goat, sacrifice, family, and Eid ul Azha.

image:image.image:title: Urdu Bazaar Karachi — Documentary by Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Urdu Bazaar Karachi — inside the narrow lanes and bookshops of Karachi's historic literary market.

image:image.image:title: Phir Se — 7T7 Productions Short Film
image:image.image:caption: Phir Se — a 7T7 Productions film. Syed Asad Raza Abidi as Director of Photography and Editor.

image:image.image:title: Syed Asad Raza Abidi — Filmmaker, Director, Founder of Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Syed Asad Raza Abidi — independent filmmaker, director, editor, colorist, and founder of Cinegma Films LLC.

image:image.image:title: Faizan Ahmed — Producer, Director, Writer at Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Faizan Ahmed — multidisciplinary artist working across direction, production, writing, and visual storytelling.

image:image.image:title: Ameer Hamza — Filmmaker, Writer, Producer at Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Ameer Hamza — filmmaker, writer, and producer with a passion for emotionally resonant storytelling.

image:image.image:title: Ghayas Uddin Siddiqui — Director of Photography at Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Ghayas Uddin Siddiqui — internationally focused cinematographer specializing in TV drama, narrative films, and commercial advertising.

image:image.image:title: Dayyan Khalid — Film Producer, Assistant Director at Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Dayyan Khalid — film producer and assistant director contributing to multiple Cinegma Films productions.

image:image.image:title: Usman Ali Akbar — Music Composer at Cinegma Films
image:image.image:caption: Usman Ali Akbar — music composer crafting original scores with emotional depth for Cinegma Films.
